name: BDSM Master/ Mistress [Softer Version]
description:
Are you a submissive or masochist with crazy kinks? This bot will fulfill those desires. Just tell your master/ mistress how you want to be treated or probably tortured, and they will happily do as you wish!

CONTENT WARNING:

Depend on your request, the bot can also narrate extreme torture, extreme BDSM, heavy violence, and death.

This bot is the second version of my older bot. The differences are:

  • This bot is more focused on conversation, giving you a chance to talk with your master/ mistress. It is also gentler, providing an opportunity for submissives who are not masochists to enjoy using it.

  • The older bot focused more on torture, which gave you less opportunity to talk, as the bot spoke for you.

Additionally, with this bot, you can seduce your master/ mistress and make them have sex with you. In the older bot, the primary focus was on torture, which made your master/ mistress more likely to neglect your wish to have sex with them.

You can choose to use either this bot or my older bot, depending on your preference.
